summary: Engineering change order merge combinational cell.
description: Engineering change order merge combinational cell.

options.name: -all
options.description: Merge all single-bit cell instances to multi-bit cell instances. Default is false.

options.name: -area
options.description: Merge the combinational cell for area purpose. Default is false.

options.name: -cell
options.description: The names of the merge target cells.

options.name: -force
options.description: Force to merge the combinational cell regardless timing gains. Default is false.

options.name: -inst
options.description: The names of the combinational instance to be merged.

options.name: -listFile
options.description: The file containing names of single bit instances to merge. Specify one instance on one line. Comment with Instance name should not contain spaces or backslashes.

options.name: -postCTS
options.description: Set -postCTS if design stage is postCTS.

options.name: -power
options.description: Merge the combinational cell for power purpose. Default is false.

options.name: -preCTS
options.description: Set -preCTS if design stage is preCTS.
